Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC006 "RAINBOWEDGERUNDX-C006" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rainbow Edge Run DX (Megastyle - 2021).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
To remove high score loading and saving to disk, the following changes were made:
1. Changed the JMP $0400 instruction at $B4C3 to JMP $C100 instead 2. Added a new routine at $C100 which: a) Patches $1F54 to RTS (60) (this prevents the high score loading error from being displayed) b) NOPs out the JSR $2056 instruction at $1FCB (this removes highscore saving) c) JMPs to $040D instead of the original $0400 to skip highscore loading
